message:
test(cve-arena): regenerate bd-1f35 thread stress results after stack reclamation and barrier fixes

Re-run the bd-1f35 (pthread thread stress) CVE arena test suite after
the stack reclamation and barrier race condition fixes. All 8 scenarios
(4 strict + 4 hardened) continue to pass.

Key changes in the output:
- Updated stderr traces for create_join_churn, mixed_detach_join, and
  fanout_fanin_single scenarios in both strict and hardened modes,
  reflecting the new unmapself_and_exit stack cleanup path for detached
  threads and the atomic barrier phase/arrived packing.
- Updated artifact_index.json with new SHA-256 hashes for the changed
  stderr output files.
- Updated trace.jsonl with refreshed timestamps and trace data.
- report.json timestamp updated; all pass/fail counts unchanged (8/8 pass).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
